final.final_sql:
SELECT s.Fname, s.Sex
FROM Student s
WHERE s.StuID IN (
    SELECT h.StuID
    FROM Has_Pet h
    GROUP BY h.StuID
    HAVING COUNT(h.PetID) > 1
);
final.answer_text: The student with more than one pet is Tracy, and their gender is female.
